brief: China signals improved trade ties with US as Trump escalates election fraud claims; Andy Burnham becomes UK PM; AI developments dominate tech news. Research papers focus on writing instruction, AI in education, and narrative visualization.
news_summary: Top stories include China's possible return of Hong Kong trade privileges, Trump's false election claims amplified by DHS, Andy Burnham's Labour leadership, and AI industry moves by Meta and Apple.
papers_summary: Papers examine second-language writing pedagogy, effects of ChatGPT on writing, and benchmark studies of multimodal LLMs for visualization literacy.

en.brief: China signals improved trade ties with US as Trump escalates election fraud claims; Andy Burnham becomes UK PM; AI developments dominate tech news. Research papers focus on writing instruction, AI in education, and narrative visualization.
en.news_summary: Top stories include China's possible return of Hong Kong trade privileges, Trump's false election claims amplified by DHS, Andy Burnham's Labour leadership, and AI industry moves by Meta and Apple.
en.papers_summary: Papers examine second-language writing pedagogy, effects of ChatGPT on writing, and benchmark studies of multimodal LLMs for visualization literacy.

zh.brief: 英国政坛迎来新首相贝安德，中英关系与AI战略成为焦点；香港禁书潮持续，特朗普选举争议升温。科研方面聚焦AI与写作工具的交互影响。
zh.news_summary: 贝安德就任英国工党党魁并即将成为首相，其务实对华政策受关注；习近平首次现身世界AI大会力推开源战略；香港国安法下禁书清单持续扩大；特朗普再提选举舞弊指控遭驳斥。
zh.papers_summary: 多篇研究探讨ChatGPT对二语写作的影响、儿童写作中的跨模态意义构建，以及科学可视化素养的评估方法，揭示AI辅助写作的机遇与挑战。

todays_image.caption: The mid-20th century ballot box symbolizes democratic choice, while China's signal to restore trade privileges for Hong Kong reflects a top-down political decision rather than a public vote.
todays_image.title: Ballot box, mid-20th century
